focus: Acceptance evidence, review-packet durability, final gate metadata, topology, and promotion wording.

findings.summary: The adversarial-review acceptance was summarized in prose without durable packet identifiers.
findings.resolution: Added T007 review packet JSON files and linked them from the report.

findings.summary: The report linked only the T006 evidence summary, which did not describe the T007 final gate command set.
findings.resolution: Added a T007 evidence summary with the required T007 verification commands and final serve status.

checks.name: candidate table coverage
checks.notes: The report table includes engine, quantization, context, latency, throughput, tool/session/intelligence result, evidence, and status.

checks.name: promotion wording
checks.notes: The determination recommends a human-gated promotion candidate and explicitly says not to auto-promote.

checks.name: topology
checks.notes: Mini remains model-free; Dark owns model, STT, and TTS paths; voice evidence caveat prevents semantic STT overclaiming.

verification.summary: Heavy and production Fast running with health 200; experimental candidates exited or absent.
